The classification of Myzorrhiza ludoviciana is not well-documented, but it is likely a member of the phylum Glomeromycota, which includes most mycorrhizal fungi. This species is native to North America and is known to form associations with various plant species. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and taxonomy of Myzorrhiza ludoviciana.
